# Django Web Project - Copilot Instructions

This is a Django web project. Follow these guidelines when working on this codebase:

- Use Django best practices and conventions
- Follow PEP 8 style guidelines for Python code
- Keep views thin and models fat
- Use class-based views where appropriate
- Write migrations for all model changes
- Use Django's built-in authentication system
- Keep settings organized (base, development, production)
